domain: Navajo iikááh sand-painting healing ceremony (Diné/Navajo): medicine man creates colored-sand altar over 30min-10hr; patient sits on painting → painting absorbs illness/imbalance from patient; post-ceremony sand erased via sacred feather + removed from hogan; Hozho (balance+harmony) restoration; 2-9 day chantway ceremony; Holy People (yei) transfer-medium; iikááh = 'place where gods come and go'
specific_mechanism: IIKAAH-PATIENT-SIT-ABSORB-ERASE-HOZHO-BASIN: basin-stability training with (1) sand-altar fault-projection scratch-space S_altar: temporary parameter subspace allocated to absorb training-faults (gradient anomalies, spike-residues, undesirable update components); (2) patient-sit absorb-fault transfer: at fault-detection, faulty gradient/state transferred into S_altar; main model weights remain clean (Hozho balanced); (3) erase-via-feather permanent-discard E_feather: after K_session steps, S_altar's contents permanently discarded (parameters re-init to zero, not merged back); (4) Hozho-balance restoration regularizer L_hozho: penalty on imbalance between trained-on-main vs scratch-absorbed; encourages main-basin stability preservation; (5) 2-9-day ceremony duration window τ_ceremony: discard-cycle length adaptive within τ_min=2 to τ_max=9 unit-steps based on fault accumulation rate. Differs from R535 MANDALA-4-FOLD-DEITY-FIRST-DISSOLUTION-BASIN-RESET (4-stage ritual cycle outline-fill-consecrate-dissolve + deity-first dissolution top-to-bottom + center-spiral inward sweep regularization + water-reintegration mixing pool + non-attachment regularizer, no sand-altar fault-scratch + no patient-sit absorb-transfer + no erase-feather permanent-discard + no Hozho-balance + no 2-9-day adaptive window) by sand-altar fault-projection scratch-space + patient-sit absorb-transfer mechanism + erase-feather permanent-discard (not merged-back) + Hozho-balance regularizer + 2-9-day adaptive ceremony duration.
llm_application: IIKAAH-PATIENT-SIT-ABSORB-ERASE-HOZHO-BASIN basin-stability training + sand-altar fault-projection scratch-space S_altar absorb gradient anomalies + patient-sit absorb-fault transfer faulty gradient + erase-feather permanent-discard E_feather K_session re-init zero + Hozho-balance restoration regularizer L_hozho main-vs-scratch + 2-9-day adaptive ceremony duration window τ_ceremony. Differs from R404. R420. R434. R450. R460. R471. R485. R498. R510 BOZUY-KEREGE. R523 MARAMURES. R535 MANDALA (closest — 4-fold + deity-first + spiral + water-reintegration). Differs from Basin-Like Loss + Reset-It Forget-It + Flat-LoRA + Crown-Frame-Reverse by sand-altar + patient-sit + erase-feather + Hozho + 2-9-day. Differs by SAND-ALTAR FAULT-PROJECTION SCRATCH + PATIENT-SIT ABSORB-TRANSFER + ERASE-FEATHER PERMANENT-DISCARD + HOZHO-BALANCE REGULARIZER + 2-9-DAY ADAPTIVE WINDOW.
novelty_claim: Basin-Like Loss Landscape 2505.17646 + Reset-It Forget-It + Flat-LoRA + Crown-Frame-Reverse cover basin-stability + reset-reinit + flat-basin paradigm. IIKAAH-PATIENT-SIT-ABSORB-ERASE-HOZHO-BASIN adds (a) sand-altar fault-projection scratch + (b) patient-sit absorb-transfer + (c) erase-feather permanent-discard (not merged back) + (d) Hozho-balance regularizer + (e) 2-9-day adaptive window. Recombination — borderline lookup.
